concepts.name: Form
concepts.description: Focuses on observing visible features, shapes, and textures.

concepts.name: Function
concepts.description: Focuses on exploring uses, mechanisms, and roles of parts.

concepts.name: Causation
concepts.description: Focuses on cause and effect, origins, and power sources.

concepts.name: Change
concepts.description: Focuses on time dimension, transformation, and growth processes.

concepts.name: Connection
concepts.prompt_logic: How is it connected to other things?
concepts.description: Focuses on system links, interdependence, and assembly.

concepts.name: Perspective
concepts.prompt_logic: What are the points of view?
concepts.description: Focuses on different opinions, subjective feelings, and multiple angles.

concepts.name: Responsibility
concepts.description: Focuses on consequences, protection awareness, and proper usage.
